# removeRow

Removes the row at the specified index.

Supported on:

*   [TableNode](/docs/plugins/api/TableNode/)

## Signature​

### removeRow(rowIndex: number): void

## Parameters​

### rowIndex​

Index of the row to remove. Must satisfy `0 <= rowIndex < numRows`.
